meta.title: Brilliante — HDR Photo Viewer for Windows
meta.description: Brilliante is an HDR photo viewer for Windows — view Ultra HDR, HEIC, motion photos, and iPhone ProRAW in vibrant colour, and give any photo a brilliant glow-up.
meta.ogDescription: View Ultra HDR, HEIC, motion photos, and iPhone ProRAW in vibrant, true-to-life colour — plus a brilliant glow-up for every ordinary photo.
meta.jsonldDescription: Brilliante is an HDR photo viewer for Windows. View Ultra HDR, HEIC, motion photos, and iPhone ProRAW in vibrant, true-to-life colour — and give every ordinary photo a brilliant glow-up.
app.name: Brilliante Photo Viewer
hero.iconAlt: Brilliante app icon — a live Ultra HDR image
hero.lede_html: See your photos in vibrant, true-to-life colour. Ultra HDR, HEIC, motion photos, and iPhone RAW — plus a brilliant glow-up for every ordinary shot.
demo.sub: Drag the slider to compare an ordinary photo with Brilliante’s HDR enhancement.
demo.altHdr: The same photo enhanced to Ultra HDR
demo.sdrNote_html: You’re viewing on an SDR display — the right side previews the colour boost Brilliante brings to standard screens too. On an HDR display, it renders in true HDR.
features.head_html: Photos, the way they were meant to look
features.sub: Brilliante reads the rich colour modern phones capture — and brings it to life on your PC.
card1.title: Vibrant HDR colour
card1.body_html: HDR photos shine in vivid, accurate colour — Ultra HDR JPEG and HDR HEIC from iPhone, Pixel, and Galaxy, plus the latest OPPO, Xiaomi, vivo, and HONOR flagships.
card2.title: Brilliant on any screen
card2.body_html: A smart HDR-style boost brings new life to ordinary photos, even on a standard (SDR) display.
card3.title: Motion photos
card3.body_html: Play the motion photos from Android phones — Pixel Top Shot and Samsung Motion Photo, in both JPEG and HEIC — right on your PC.
card4.title: The newest RAW formats
card4.body_html: Opens every generation of iPhone ProRAW — including the new DNG 1.7 with JPEG XL from iPhone 17 and Samsung Expert RAW, a format Microsoft Photos can't open.
card5.title: True 10-bit HEIC
card5.body_html: Decodes 10-bit HEIC for the deepest, smoothest gradients and detail.
card6.title: Photo details
card6.body_html: See EXIF metadata at a glance, including the GPS location on a map.
closing.sub: Download Brilliante free from the Microsoft Store and see your library in a whole new light.
consent.text: We use cookies to understand how this site is used.
langPicker.label: Language
